sessions.notes_for_next: Model class: VisionDocumentSummary (src/giljo_mcp/models/products.py:659). Repo methods on VisionDocumentRepository: create_summary(session, tenant_key, document_id, product_id, source, ratio, summary, tokens_original, tokens_summary), get_summaries(session, tenant_key, document_id), get_best_summary(session, tenant_key, document_id, ratio) -> AI preferred, get_product_summaries(session, tenant_key, product_id, ratio). Ratio uses Decimal('0.33') and Decimal('0.66'). Source values: 'sumy' and 'ai'. The extraction_custom_instructions column is on Product model. Old summary columns on VisionDocument still written (backward compat).

sessions.summary: Created vision_document_summaries table, VisionDocumentSummary model, and 4 repository methods. Wired Sumy output to new table at all 3 endpoint injection points (create, update, regenerate). Fixed pre-existing gap where regenerate_summaries did not trigger consolidation. 8 TDD tests pass. Commit: 71868be1.
